text.title: living-documentation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for living-documentation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent overwrites an entire docs page on re-run, including manually-authored introduction sections.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without AUTO-GENERATED tags, agents have no boundary to respect. Use explicit section markers and instruct agents to only update content between those tags.

failure-mode.description: Running Vale with default rules on technical writing without customization.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default Vale rules produce too many false positives on technical prose (passive voice warnings, capitalization rules). Configure `.vale.ini` and disable overly aggressive rules before using in CI.

failure-mode.description: Agents updating OpenAPI specs without running a breaking-change check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Renamed fields and removed endpoints are breaking changes. Run `redocly diff` or `bump.sh diff` before committing spec changes to surface regressions.
